harnessVersion: gemini-cli@main (verified via upstream source) — embedded in antegravity/agy v1.0.1

outputChannelCompensations.generatedFile: Antegravity fires AfterTool for tool calls but the in-payload schema for file-write tools beyond run_shell_command has not been enumerated against the source; F19 routes file-write paths through require-review until per-tool wiring is confirmed.
outputChannelCompensations.commitMessage: Antegravity commit-text surfaces flow through AfterTool on git-invoking tools; F19 routes commit-message writes through require-review (compensating stricter rule).
outputChannelCompensations.prText: Antegravity PR-text surfaces flow through AfterTool on gh-CLI-style tools; F19 routes prText writes through require-review (compensating stricter rule).
outputChannelCompensations.finalMessage: Antegravity does not expose a pre-emit hook for the assistant's final message; F19 routes finalMessage writes through require-review (compensating stricter rule).

negativeCapabilities.reason: Antegravity hook surface (via google-gemini/gemini-cli) does not expose execution-time env baselines; F15 envelope build/verify cannot be wired
negativeCapabilities.evidence: envelopeReporting: false; no env-related fields in the verified BeforeToolInput / AfterToolInput interfaces (packages/core/src/hooks/types.ts)

negativeCapabilities.reason: Antegravity surfaces an mcp_context field in BeforeToolInput (packages/core/src/hooks/types.ts — BeforeToolInput.mcp_context?: McpToolContext) indicating MCP tool invocations may reach the BeforeTool hook surface, but per-handler dispatch coverage has not been enumerated end-to-end against a live instance. Classified as unverified until a live MCP tool fire is confirmed.
negativeCapabilities.evidence: packages/core/src/hooks/types.ts (BeforeToolInput.mcp_context?: McpToolContext — optional field present but coverage of all MCP handlers unverified)

negativeCapabilities.reason: Gemini CLI / Antegravity has no Skills concept analogous to Claude Code skills. There is no skill-invocation hook surface. Classified as none.
negativeCapabilities.evidence: packages/core/src/hooks/types.ts (HookEventName enum has no Skill or SkillUse event); no skills framework in google-gemini/gemini-cli source

negativeCapabilities.reason: Antegravity exposes AfterAgent and AfterModel hooks (packages/core/src/hooks/types.ts — HookEventName.AfterAgent, AfterModel) but no pre-emit hook specifically for the assistant's final message in the Claude Code sense; final-message output is neither observed nor intercepted
negativeCapabilities.evidence: packages/core/src/hooks/types.ts (HookEventName enum: AfterAgent, AfterModel available; no pre-emit final-message-specific event)

negativeCapabilities.reason: AfterTool + toolOutput are covered via tool_response field in AfterToolInput (packages/core/src/hooks/types.ts); generatedFiles / commitMessage / prText flow through AfterTool only when their tool names match the operator's matcher; finalMessage and screenshots have no interception surface

F15 execution-envelope build/verify requires harness-side env baseline capture which Antegravity does not expose via its hook surface. Decision lattice still re-checks critical writes against contract-declared envelopes; this is the harness limitation, not a Lilara gap.
negativeCapabilities.evidence: envelopeReporting: false; no exec-time envelope surface in packages/core/src/hooks/ of google-gemini/gemini-cli

compensatingRestrictions: Decision-engine sources Antegravity IR trustMeta as: argsFidelity=exact, cwdFidelity=exact, envelopeReporting=false. Floors can rely on the adapter's extractCwd output (i.cwd is a string in HookInput — packages/core/src/hooks/types.ts) and tool_input.command for the command string.

Antegravity uses Gemini CLI event names: 'BeforeTool' (not 'PreToolUse') and 'AfterTool' (not 'PostToolUse'). The tool matcher must use 'run_shell_command' (not 'Bash'). Operators MUST use the native Gemini names in .gemini/settings.json; run 'agy hooks migrate' to auto-convert Claude Code settings. Using wrong event names silently skips the hook.

Antegravity honours exit code 2 for blocks (packages/core/src/hooks/hookRunner.ts convertPlainTextToHookOutput — exit 2+ → decision: deny). No harnessOutput:'permission-json' opt-in is needed (contrast with ClawCode, which ignores exit codes and reads stdout JSON). The adapter uses the default harnessOutput:'echo' path.

Protocol verified via public google-gemini/gemini-cli source (Apache-2.0). Live end-to-end hook fire in agy v1.0.1 with corrected event names (BeforeTool/AfterTool + run_shell_command matcher) has not yet been confirmed. Operators should run the capture recipe in WIRING_PLAN.md and report the payload shape.
